4. `hm-full.md` (in workflows directory) line 545: `workflows/hm-help/modes/topic.md` → should be `workflows/help/modes/hm-topic.md`

## Constraints
- Must preserve all other content in the workflow files
- Must pass typecheck
- Must commit atomically
